overall.description: A cinematic third-person game engine scene depicting a cloaked character walking through a mountainous landscape at golden hour. The character traverses a dirt path from an open fenced area into a narrow canyon, with dramatic sunset lighting and atmospheric haze creating a fantasy adventure atmosphere.

approaching the entrance to a narrow canyon as the wooden fence ends

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an open mountain trail bordered by a wooden fence on the right, heading toward a distant stone castle silhouetted against a dramatic golden-hour sky. A small orange chicken briefly crosses the path from right to left as the character approaches the entrance to a narrow canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow canyon passage between steep rock walls

events.description: entering the narrow canyon with steep rock walls rising on both sides

agents.ego_description: character continues walking deeper into the canyon passage, following the winding trail

steep rocky cliff face forming the right wall of the narrow passage
shallow water stream reflecting the sunset light, running down the canyon floor

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow canyon passage where steep rock walls rise on both sides, replacing the open landscape and wooden fence. A shallow stream runs down the center of the trail as the character walks deeper into the enclosed terrain, with the sunset visible only as a narrow band of light above.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from an expansive mountain trail into the claustrophobic depths of a narrow canyon. It begins with the character walking along an open path bordered by a wooden fence, heading toward a distant stone castle silhouetted against a dramatic golden-hour sky. As a small orange chicken crosses the path, the camera follows the character toward the mouth of a rocky passage. The scene then shifts as the open landscape and fence are replaced by steep, towering rock walls that enclose the trail on both sides. Finally, the environment narrows further into a canyon where a shallow stream runs down the center of the path, leaving the sunset visible only as a thin band of light far above.
